_publications._publicationTitle: Nested pediatric low-grade glioma cerebral organoid avatars reveal glutamatergic neuron stromal growth dependency.

_contextSnippet: we altered the initial amount of PA cells used for static co-culture with 4-WIV hCOs (1x10^4, 3x10^4, or 1x10^5) and found that only co-culturing hCOs with 1x10^4 cells generated PANCOs
details: Optimal PANCO generation required 1x10^4 cells; higher numbers (3x10^4 or 1x10^5) did not generate PANCOs
